name: security-suite
description: All-in-one security toolkit for Claude Code: 28 skills + 6 specialist subagents + commands. Offensive security (pentest, red team, cloud, mobile, Web3, AD, privesc, wireless, phishing), defensive review (OWASP 2025/2026, multi-language SAST via MEDUSA), reconnaissance automation (ReconForge), supply-chain security (Dependabot), curated SecLists wordlists/payloads/patterns, plus a full-codebase scan framework (/security-scan) and code-review commands.
